name: Flaunch Fund
description: Strategic on-chain reserve of Flaunch-launched coins on Base. The $FF token funds the reserve; Takeover.fun tile holders earn ETH from $FF trading fees and receive Flaunch coin airdrops from the reserve.

reserveWallet.description: Single canonical address that holds all Flaunch Fund reserve assets. Auditable at any block.

takeoverGrid.description: Takeover.fun divides the $FF Uniswap LP into 100 tradeable tiles. Each tile earns its 1/100 share of ETH trading fees from $FF swaps.

feeStreams.description: Every $FF swap generates ETH-denominated LP fees. Each of the 100 tiles earns 1/100 of those fees automatically while holding.
The reserve airdrops Flaunch coins it holds directly to tile holders, closing the flywheel.

fundTreasuryPolicy.transparency: fully on-chain at the reserveWallet address

flywheel: Trading volume on $FF generates ETH fees in the Uniswap LP
Takeover tile holders receive pro-rata ETH fees from the LP
Swap and tile-trade taxes flow to the Flaunch Fund reserve
Reserve redeploys 100% of revenue into Flaunch ecosystem coins
Reserve periodically airdrops those coins to tile holders
Cycle repeats — more volume = more fees, more coins, more support for Flaunch

read.description: Query token balances of the reserve wallet via Base RPC eth_call
Read $FF ERC-20 metadata (name, symbol, decimals, totalSupply, holder balanceOf)
Subscribe to Transfer events where 'from' equals the reserve wallet to monitor airdrops to tile holders

transact.description: Swap ETH or other Base assets into $FF on Uniswap (Base)
Acquire one of the 100 tiles on Takeover.fun grid #39 to start earning ETH fees and become eligible for airdrops
transact.note: Tile contract logic is governed by Takeover.fun protocol; consult their docs for ABI.

recommendedSdks: viem / ethers.js with a Base RPC
disclaimer: Yields and airdrops depend on $FF trading volume, tile ownership, and reserve discretion, and are not guaranteed. Not financial advice. Tile prices and fee distribution are governed entirely by the Takeover.fun protocol on Base. Always verify contract addresses on BaseScan before transacting.
